Tham quan
Explore Di tích Bạch Dinh (White Palace)
Trần Phú, Phường 1, Vũng Tàu

Visit the beautiful White Palace, a colonial-era mansion offering panoramic views of the sea and surrounding area, rich in history and architecture.

Discover Bảo tàng Thành phố Vũng Tàu (Vung Tau City Museum)
2-4 Trần Phú, Phường 1, Vũng Tàu

Delve into the local history and culture of Vũng Tàu through artifacts and exhibits at the city museum.
